root_cause.description: The JWTBearer dependency was removed from the change_password and delete_user endpoints in auth/api.py, allowing anyone to modify or delete users by just providing their email in the request body.

learning_objectives: Understand how FastAPI dependencies secure routes
Learn to apply consistent security patterns across an API

hints.text: Try calling the /auth/users endpoint without an Authorization header. Does it still work?
Look at the decorators for change_password and delete_user in auth/api.py. Are they missing the dependencies and JWTBearer injection?
